barRaise.topFinding: One day on from the first bar-raise, the picture is unchanged in substance: the code keeps shipping and the canonical surface still lags the native-3D rework that has been live since 2026-05-29. The single release since the last review, v0.98.1 (d740d97), was a `project.godot` truncation-recovery plus a new commit-gate integrity guard - good defensive work, but unrelated to the documentation debt. The whole doc cluster from 06-09 is still open: CLAUDE.md still primes HBH as a 2D AStarGrid2D game, the GDD Decisions tab has no locked entry for the 2D-to-3D commitment, the Roadmap has no 3D milestone, `OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md` still has zero 3D-crowd rows, the 3D save has no version field, and `write-dashboard-status.ps1` still hardcodes the wrong milestone. Two items did improve: the working tree is clean (last review's uncommitted `publish-gdd.ps1` + `project.godot` is committed) and the FUSE-truncation defense got materially stronger. None of this is a live gameplay bug; it is canonical-doc debt that is now twelve days old and not yet being paid down.
